'''Lynne Hazelden''' portrayed [[Karie Neth/Legends|Karie Neth]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. Her character was later featured as a card in the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Lynn worked on this film in 1982 as a Supporting Artiste. 20yrs later... she found herself on a Collectors Card with a character now known as Karie Neth. [sic]|Lynn Hazelden's web page about her Star Wars experience|<ref name="Home Page">{{WebCite|url=http://www.lynnehazelden.350.com|text=Lynne Hazelden Home Page|work=LynneHazelden.350.com|archivedate=20120620204120|nolive=1}}</ref>}}
In [[1982]], Lynne Hazelden portrayed an unidentified [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], later identified in the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] as [[Karie Neth/Legends|Karie Neth]].<ref name="SWCCG">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Karie Neth}}</ref>

Hazelden's nephew, David Hazelden, announced on her official website that she passed away on [[December 3]], [[2013]]. Her Funeral service was held on Monday, [[December 16]], at the Worthing Crematorium, Britain.<ref name="Funeral" />
